title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Imperial Logistics India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Imperial Logistics India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Imperial Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Distribution Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Imperial Logistics India:
Imperial Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Imperial Logistics India!
